summary: Iteration 141: Instant Frequency Play feature testing. Backend endpoints (GET /api/recommendations, GET /api/dashboard/suggestions) correctly return 'action: play_frequency' and 'frequency_hz' fields for frequency-related recommendations. Frontend Dashboard correctly handles these actions - clicking a frequency recommendation plays the frequency via MixerContext (shows toast 'Playing XXX Hz') instead of navigating away. Fixed a critical bug in Frequencies.js where 'playing' variable was undefined after MixerContext refactor.
seed_data_creation: Test mood entries created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Instant Frequency Play feature fully implemented and tested. Backend returns 'action: play_frequency' and 'frequency_hz' in recommendations. Frontend Dashboard handles this by calling playFrequency(hz) via MixerContext instead of navigating. Frequencies page now uses MixerContext for global audio state.

backend_recommendations_endpoint.play_frequency_action: PASS - Frequency recommendations have action='play_frequency' and frequency_hz field
backend_recommendations_endpoint.mood_frequency_mapping: PASS - MOOD_FREQUENCY_MAP correctly maps moods to healing frequencies (e.g., peaceful -> 432 Hz)

backend_dashboard_suggestions_endpoint.mood_frequency_suggestion: INFO - mood-frequency suggestion appears when user has both mood and journal data

backend_frequencies_endpoint.required_fields: PASS - Each frequency has id, frequency, name, category, chakra, color

frontend_dashboard_frequency_recommendat.play_frequency_card_visible: PASS - rec-play_frequency card shows '432 Hz — Universal Harmony'
frontend_dashboard_frequency_recommendat.tap_to_play_badge: PASS - 'Tap to play instantly' badge visible on frequency recommendations
frontend_dashboard_frequency_recommendat.click_plays_frequency: PASS - Clicking shows toast 'Playing 432 Hz - Universal Harmony'
frontend_dashboard_frequency_recommendat.stays_on_dashboard: PASS - User stays on /dashboard after clicking (doesn't navigate away)

frontend_frequencies_page.page_loads: PASS - Frequencies page loads with 12 frequency cards
frontend_frequencies_page.play_button_works: PASS - Clicking play button shows 'Now playing: 174Hz' and Stop button
frontend_frequencies_page.mixer_context_integration: PASS - Uses MixerContext for global audio state

bug_fixed.frequencies_js_playing_undefined: FIXED - Line 80 referenced undefined 'playing' variable, replaced with activeFreqs.size check

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Frequencies.js crashed with 'ReferenceError: playing is not defined'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: When Frequencies.js was refactored to use MixerContext, the old 'playing' state variable was removed but line 80 still referenced it for the 'Now playing' status text
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Replaced 'playing' with 'activeFreqs.size > 0' check and updated the display text to show active frequencies from MixerContext
